Container.Name: wodGod
Container.Overview:
wodGod is a stateful CrossFit programming engine for up to 10 athletes. It generates personalized workouts via an LLM (Ollama or OpenAI-compatible), stores training history in PostgreSQL, and enforces programming rules and safety constraints. Dark-mode, mobile-first web GUI included.
REQUIRES: A running PostgreSQL 15 instance (e.g. the official postgres container on Unraid). Point DATABASE_URL at your Postgres and run the migrations (see project README).
Container.Description: wodGod — Stateful CrossFit programming engine. Generates personalized workouts via LLM, tracks training history, enforces safety constraints. Requires an external PostgreSQL 15 database.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the wodGod web interface and API.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string. Point this at your existing Postgres container/instance. Example: postgresql://user:pass@IP:5432/wodgod

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Secret key for signing JWT auth tokens. CHANGE THIS to a random string for security.

Config.Name: JWT Expiry (hours)
Config.Description: How long JWT tokens remain valid, in hours.

Config.Name: LLM Provider
Config.Description: LLM backend to use. Set to 'ollama' for a local Ollama server, or 'openai_compatible' for vLLM / text-generation-inference / OpenAI-compatible APIs.

Config.Name: LLM Base URL
Config.Description: URL of your LLM server. For Ollama use http://YOUR_IP:11434. For OpenAI-compatible use http://YOUR_IP:8080 (or wherever your server runs).

Config.Name: LLM Model
Config.Description: Model name to use for workout generation. For Ollama: e.g. 'llama3'. For OpenAI-compatible: e.g. 'meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct'.

Config.Name: LLM API Key
Config.Description: API key for OpenAI-compatible providers. Leave blank for Ollama or if your provider doesn't require a key.
